title: 2b2t Queue Scheduler
description: A Fabric mod to join the 2b2t queue at a set time, ensuring you're at the front when you're ready to play.
body:
![2b2tqueue_mod_icon](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7ed9fe95-3169-4c29-9792-289a97a425e0)
*A Fabric mod to join the 2b2t queue at a set time, ensuring you're at the front when you're ready to play.*  

### Setting Up  
1. **Open Minecraft** and configure the queue join time using [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).
   > Military time format. (Ex: 20 Hours and 45 minutes is 8:45 PM)
2. **Leave Minecraft Open** and the mod will automatically join the queue at the specified time. 
   > You must be outside of a world for the mod to connect to the server successfully.
3. If AFK-Leave is enabled, you must go into ModMenu and set AFK to False before reaching the front of the queue, or you’ll be disconnected.
   > Alternative: If AFK-Leave is disabled, you'll need an Anti-AFK mod to avoid the 2b2t AFK kick, or you'll be disconnected after a few minutes.  

`As of v1.1.0, you can set a custom server address if you need this functionality for a server besides 2b2t!`

### How do I pick a time?
The mod doesn't speed up or bypass the queue. It just puts you in line at a specific time. If you want to play at 9AM the next day and you expect the queue to be about 7 hours long, then set the mod to join the queue at 2AM so that you are in around 9AM. You could add time (1:30AM) to make sure that you are in on time, or you could remove time (2:30AM) to make sure that you are ready by the time you are out of the queue.

# [Discord](https://discord.gg/ZCaGkZeb4C)
Stop by and ask if you need help! If you like the mod, then just come say hello!
